_comment: This file is OVERWRITTEN each security review. Do NOT append to it.

ssh_attacks.fail2ban_status: active - sshd jail running, 2 currently banned, 4506 total banned
ssh_attacks.change_since_last: fail2ban total bans 4506 (up from 4420, +86). 2 IPs currently banned (down from 7 — bans expired). 17394 failed passwords (+377). Continued brute-force from botnets (80.94.92.x, 2.57.121.x, 92.118.39.x, 131.161.249.x, 150.95.112.x). Only authorized activity from novakj.

pdf_security.innerHTML_note: 88 usages across 25 JS files — all safe: static templates, clearing operations, escaped user data, numeric-only interpolation, blob URLs, hardcoded SVG, or escapeHtml() helper reads. tables.js uses 5 innerHTML writes (4 clearing, 1 integer-only interpolation).

tables_module_review.feature: Table extraction & export — detect tables in PDF pages, preview, edit, export as CSV/XLSX/clipboard
tables_module_review.innerHTML_detail: 4 clearing operations (innerHTML = ''), 1 integer-only template (Table idx + Page num — no user data)
tables_module_review.text_display: All PDF-extracted text displayed via textContent (cell rendering line 707, card info line 627, preview rows line 637). contentEditable cells sync back via textContent.
tables_module_review.csv_export: Properly escapes double quotes and wraps fields containing commas/quotes/newlines. UTF-8 BOM for Excel.
tables_module_review.xlsx_export: Uses SheetJS library (self-hosted). Data passed as arrays, no HTML injection path.
tables_module_review.clipboard: Uses navigator.clipboard.writeText (plain text). Fallback uses textarea + execCommand('copy').
tables_module_review.file_downloads: Uses sanitizeFilename() from utils.js for all download filenames.

jszip_min_js.purpose: ZIP file creation for split, convert, batch, and extract-images module downloads

xlsx_full_min_js.purpose: XLSX export for table extraction module

known_issues: server_tokens set to 'build' - leaks nginx version (nginx/1.26.3 Ubuntu) in Server header. Should be 'off'.
No general *.md nginx block - only CLAUDE.md specifically blocked. Any new .md file added to webroot would be publicly accessible.
UFW firewall is inactive - only SSH and HTTP/HTTPS ports are needed but no firewall enforces this.
disable_symlinks off in nginx config - low risk since only novakj can write to webroot.
CGI location block exists in nginx but no CGI scripts present - dead config that could be removed.
Codex proxy at /codex returns 502 - backend not running. No security risk but dead endpoint.

merge.js, batch.js, and hyperlinks.js use escapeHtml() in attribute contexts (title/aria-label) which does not escape double quotes. CSP script-src 'self' mitigates inline handler injection. Should add escapeAttr() function.

hyperlinks.js: detected PDF link URLs not validated for protocol scheme. A malicious PDF could contain javascript: URIs in link annotations. CSP + noopener/noreferrer mitigate. Should add protocol allowlist (http/https/mailto) before window.open().
img2pdf.js image validation uses OR logic (MIME type OR extension) - slightly permissive but acceptable for client-side processing.
insert-pages.js has dead code: escapeHtml() function defined but never called.
metadata.js has dead code: escapeHtml() function defined but never called.
batch.js line 294: escapeHtml() used with textContent causes double-escaping — cosmetic display bug for filenames containing &, <, >.
notes: Full security review completed — 63 checks passed, 0 critical findings.

NEW: Reviewed tables.js (table extraction & export, 868 lines): 5 innerHTML writes (4 clearing, 1 integer-only). No eval/Function/document.write. All PDF text via textContent. CSV properly escapes quotes. XLSX via SheetJS (self-hosted). Clipboard via plain text API. Downloads use sanitizeFilename(). SECURE.
NEW: xlsx.full.min.js (SheetJS, 952KB) added to /lib/ — self-hosted, used by tables module for XLSX export.
innerHTML count: 88 across 25 JS files (up from 74/24 — tables.js adds 5, 38 total JS files now). All verified safe.
All 38 JS files scanned: no eval(), Function(), document.write() found. No sensitive files or symlinks in webroot.
SSH: fail2ban total bans 4506 (+86 since last review). 2 IPs currently banned (down from 7). 17394 failed passwords (+377). Continued brute-force from botnets. Only authorized activity from novakj.
SSL certificate valid until June 18, 2026 (77 days remaining).
Nginx config syntax valid. All security headers confirmed in HTTP response.
recommendations: MEDIUM-LOW: Add protocol allowlist to hyperlinks.js handleLinkClick() — only allow http:, https:, mailto: schemes before calling window.open() on detected PDF links
LOW: Add escapeAttr() function to merge.js, batch.js, and hyperlinks.js for attribute contexts instead of escapeHtml()
LOW: Fix batch.js line 294 — use fileName directly with textContent instead of escapeHtml(fileName)
LOW: Set server_tokens off in nginx.conf to stop leaking version info (currently exposes nginx/1.26.3)
LOW: Enable UFW firewall (sudo ufw allow 22,80,443/tcp && sudo ufw enable)
LOW: Add general *.md deny rule to nginx with explicit exception for known safe files
LOW: Remove dead escapeHtml() function from insert-pages.js and metadata.js
LOW: Remove unused CGI location block from nginx config
LOW: Consider disable_symlinks on in nginx for defense in depth
